question: A semicircular row of enclosed yards in this city, as seen from a train, appears in a series of Gustave Doré engravings depicting this city’s working class. Two prints set in this city contrast sickly and skeletal people drinking one beverage with healthy people drinking beer. The mourners at a funeral drink off the coffin lid of a dead syphilitic woman in a series of engravings set in this city. An artist depicted the declines of Moll Hackabout and Tom Rakewell in this city in two series of engravings. In German cuisine, varieties of this food are denoted by the root "wurst." In a traditional English breakfast, a variety of this food is prepared with blood and is called black pudding.
